seo.title: Tutor - Mii de grile reale pe materia ta | etutor.ro | Tutor
seo.meta_description: Alege o materie și exersează pe grile reale, gratuit și fără cont — BAC, Evaluare Națională, admitere. Îți salvezi progresul, serii zilnice și învățare adaptivă.
h1_texts: Thousands of real practice questions, on your subject

issues.title: 1 adrese email expuse
issues.recommendation: Ascundeti email-urile sau folositi formulare de contact pentru a evita spam-ul.

issues.title: Lipseste banner-ul de cookie consent
issues.description: Site-ul foloseste 1 trackere dar nu are banner de consimtamant GDPR.
issues.recommendation: Implementati un sistem de cookie consent (ex: CookieBot, OneTrust) care cere acordul utilizatorilor.

issues.title: Lipseste politica de confidentialitate
issues.description: Site-ul nu are o politica de confidentialitate vizibila.
issues.recommendation: Creati o pagina de Privacy Policy accesibila din footer.

issues.title: 1 servicii de tracking detectate
issues.recommendation: Documentati toate trackerele in politica de confidentialitate si asigurati-va ca sunt incarcate doar dupa consimtamant.

issues.title: Google Analytics fara consimtamant
issues.description: Google Analytics este incarcat inainte de a obtine consimtamantul utilizatorului.
issues.recommendation: Configurati GA sa se incarce doar dupa acceptarea cookie-urilor de analiza.

issues.title: Problema ierarhie heading-uri: Skipped heading level: H2 to H4
issues.description: Ierarhia de heading-uri trebuie sa fie logica si fara salturi.
issues.recommendation: Restructurati heading-urile pentru a urma o ierarhie logica (H1 > H2 > H3).

issues.title: Lipseste link-ul 'Skip to content'
issues.description: Nu exista un link pentru a sari peste navigatie.
issues.recommendation: Adaugati un link ascuns 'Skip to main content' la inceputul paginii.

issues.title: Navigare prin tastatura limitata
issues.description: Elementele interactive pot sa nu fie accesibile prin tastatura.
issues.recommendation: Asigurati-va ca toate elementele interactive au focus visible si sunt accesibile prin Tab.

issues.title: Missing key contact info
issues.description: Missing: phone, email, address. Visitors need visible contact details to trust the site.
issues.recommendation: Add clickable phone, email, and physical address to header/footer or a contact page.

issues.title: Weak "About" / legitimacy signals
issues.description: No About Us page link detected in navigation or footer.
issues.recommendation: Add an About page with company story, team info, and proof points.

issues.title: No social proof detected
issues.description: No testimonials, reviews, ratings, or case study sections found.
issues.recommendation: Add testimonials, client logos, review badges, or case study snippets.

issues.title: No competitor selected
issues.description: Competitor comparison requires a competitor URL. None was provided or auto-detected.
issues.recommendation: Provide a competitor URL to enable gap analysis.
